                        <span class="info-label">Company Introduction:</span>
                        <span class="info-text">Hebei Hanyue Textiles Manufacturing Limited, established in 1996, is a private enterprise with a registered capital of 10 million yuan, a total asset of 40 million yuan or more, an annual capacity of over 50 million yuan, and an area of 7, 000 sqm or so (including a building size of 5, 000 sqm). Our company is located in Gucheng Town of Dingxing, adjacent to Beijing-Guangzhou Railway and 107 National Highway. <br><br>The products include drawnwork, textile, home ornaments, student apartment articles, hotel articles and hospital beddings. Combining traditional drawnwork like handcraft appliqu and embroidery with modern technique, the products are featured by exquisite workmanship and unique style. Containing rich culture and oriental charm, the products are very popular in domestic and overseas markets. <br><br>Excellent products have brought us remarkable development. 70% of the products are sold to Europe, North America and Southeast Asia. In terms of domestic markets, we take market as guide and combine domestic consumption custom with international fashion patterns to develop household articles with different fabrics, different techniques and different tastes. Our sales network is constantly enlarging. We catch every opportunity to make good use of our advantages, deepen reform and keep pace with times to meet demands of socialist market economy. Under the great support of all circles, we have made great progress. We were frequently awarded such honors as "AAA Credit Enterprise" by finance institutions, "Contract-honoring and Promise-keeping Enterprise" by industry and commerce administrations, "Quality Trustworthy Unit, " "Consumer Trusted Unit, " "No Complaint Unit" and "Excellent Private Enterprise" by Baoding City Government. Huazhi trademark was honored "Hebei Famous Trademark" and Huazhi brand "Hebei Famous Brand. " We are neither conceited nor rash in face of these honors; Instead, we enhance management by improving product quality and popularity and dig staff potential to improve their quality. <br><br>In the quality principle of "Innovation, Improvement, Progress, " we set up a complete set of supportive service system. In 2002, we passed the certification of ISO9001: 2000 Quality Management System, which means our management and service are internationally recognized. <br><br>We are proud of our garden-like environment, cutting-edge equipment, reliable quality, strong technical force, flexible sales strategy, high-quality staff, advanced management and comprehensive strengthen. We shall walk hand in hand for a greater future!</span>

     <script type="text/javascript">
    var moveTo = function(src, tar, mode){
        var target = jQuery(tar);
        mode = mode || 'empty';

        var children = jQuery(src).children();
        var nodes = [];

        switch(mode){
            case 'sort': {
                nodes = [].slice.call(target.children()).concat([].slice.call(children));
                nodes = nodes.sort(function(a, b){return parseInt(a.getAttribute('cz-index')) - parseInt(b.getAttribute('cz-index'))});

                target.empty();
            }; break;
            case 'empty': {
                target.empty();
                nodes = children;
            }; break;
            default: {
                nodes = children;
            };
        }

        if(mode === 'replace'){
            target.replaceWith(nodes);
        }else{
            target.append(nodes);
        }
    };

</script>
